## Checklist

Please confirm the following before requesting a review:

- [ ] I have **tested my patch** (e.g., loaded the module, ran relevant examples or scripts against a live kernel)
- [ ] I have **checked the code style** (follows Linux kernel coding style; no trailing whitespace, correct indentation, etc.)
- [ ] I have disclosed whether **AI assistance was used** in writing any part of this patch (see note below)

> **Note on AI use:** If you used an AI tool (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude) to generate or assist with any part of this patch, please briefly describe how it was used. This helps maintainers understand the origin of the code and review it appropriately.
